requests.prompt: Vertical 9:16 one-take ad for Pan-Seared Steak: prove A richly seared steak with a browned crust and juicy, rosy center—restaurant-quality presentation and steam. Same character and setting: Single adult home-cook hand model with clean hands and short nails; Charcoal gray apron over a light neutral long-sleeve shirt; Hair off-camera; Cozy home. Start pain: Vertical close-up of a matte black cast-iron skillet on a home kitchen stovetop. A pale, lightly browned steak sits in the center with almost no crust. A right hand with matte stainless tongs gently. Shift to proof without cuts or scene changes: Same kitchen and angle style, now on the wooden butcher-block. A pan-seared steak with a deep mahogany crust rests on the board, steam rising, backlit by warm side light. The hand uses a matte-finish chef’s knife to slice the steak into thick, even slices, revealing a rosy, juicy center. The hand gently. Keep one scene, one main subject, controlled camera, natural motion, stable face/hands/product, and sharp proof detail. No subtitles, UI, watermarks, fake logos, random text, extra characters, montage, split screen, or shaky camera.
requests.negative_prompt: cuts, jump cuts, montage, split screen, scene change, multiple locations, extra characters, subtitles, UI, watermarks, fake logos, random text, shaky camera, flicker, warped hands, distorted face, warped product, blurred proof detail

audio_directions: Quiet kitchen room tone with faint, disappointing sizzle. No music yet. Subtle utensil clink; no voiceover.
Warm, light music fades in. Knife-on-board slicing sounds and a soft steam hiss. Gentle VO (optional): "Restaurant-quality at home."

critic_expectation.purpose: Show a complete one-take ad for Pan-Seared Steak: Home-cooked steak often turns out pale and underwhelming, lacking that deep crust and sizzle that makes it feel special. resolves into A richly seared steak with a browned crust and juicy, rosy.
must_show: single continuous one-take full ad with no cuts, montage, split screen, or scene changes

opens with the customer pain: Vertical close-up of a matte black cast-iron skillet on a home kitchen stovetop. A pale, lightly browned steak sits in the center with almost no crust. A right hand with matte stainless tongs gently presses the steak; there is only a faint, weak sizzle and little steam. Warm kitchen lighting but the steak looks under-seared. Camera is locked off, framing medium-close on the skillet and steak. Clean countertop and backsplash softly blurred in background, no logos. Keep the action minimal and realistic.

then transitions naturally into the product proof: Same kitchen and angle style, now on the wooden butcher-block. A pan-seared steak with a deep mahogany crust rests on the board, steam rising, backlit by warm side light. The hand uses a matte-finish chef’s knife to slice the steak into thick, even slices, revealing a rosy, juicy center. The hand gently fans the slices, tilting the board slightly so the crust texture and glistening interior fill the frame. Steam is clearly visible against the soft background. Clean, appetizing surfaces; no.
physically plausible sequential motion in one scene
same recurring character, wardrobe, and scene from asset memory: Single adult home-cook hand model with clean hands and short nails; no jewelry.; Charcoal gray apron over a light neutral long-sleeve.
must_avoid: cuts, jump cuts, montage, split screen, scene change, multiple locations, extra characters, subtitles, UI, watermarks, fake logos, random text, shaky camera, flicker, warped hands, distorted face, warped product, blurred proof detail
unrequested subtitles, captions, UI, watermarks, fake logos, background text, or random letters
quality_checks: stable face, hands, objects, and camera motion
the pain-to-proof transition is readable without cuts
key proof or problem detail is visible, sharp, and easy to understand
visible product appearance stays consistent with the product reference image
